schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
schemes.benefit: Full fee + Rs 3,000-12,000/year maintenance for SC students in Class 11 to PhD
schemes.benefit_hi: SC छात्रों को कक्षा 11 से PhD तक पूरी फीस + ₹3,000-12,000/वर्ष

schemes.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students (Class 9-10)
schemes.benefit: Rs 150-350/month maintenance + Rs 500 book grant for SC students Class 9-10
schemes.eligibility: SC students in Class 9-10; income < Rs 2 lakh

schemes.name: National Overseas Scholarship for SC Students
schemes.benefit: Full scholarship for Master's/PhD at foreign universities (airfare + tuition + living)
schemes.benefit_hi: विदेशी विश्वविद्यालय में Master's/PhD — हवाई भाड़ा + फीस + जीवन-यापन
schemes.eligibility: SC students under 35; income < Rs 6 lakh/year; 60%+ marks

schemes.name: National Fellowship for SC Students (UGC-NFSC)
schemes.benefit: Rs 25,000-28,000/month fellowship for SC PhD students
schemes.eligibility: SC students admitted to PhD program in UGC-recognized university

schemes.name: PM Adarsh Gram Yojana (SC Majority Villages)
schemes.benefit: Integrated development of SC-majority villages — roads, sanitation, education, livelihood
schemes.benefit_hi: SC बहुल गाँवों का एकीकृत विकास — सड़क, स्वच्छता, शिक्षा
schemes.eligibility: SC community in villages with 50%+ SC population

schemes.name: SC Sub-Plan (Dalit Component Plan)
schemes.benefit: Funds equivalent to SC population % earmarked in all ministry budgets for SC welfare
schemes.benefit_hi: सभी मंत्रालयों के बजट में SC जनसंख्या अनुपात में धनराशि आरक्षित

schemes.name: PM Daksh Yojana (Skill Training for SC/OBC)
schemes.benefit: Free skill training with Rs 1,000-1,500/day stipend in 50+ trade courses
schemes.benefit_hi: 50+ व्यापार पाठ्यक्रमों में मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण + ₹1,000-1,500/दिन वजीफा

schemes.name: National Safai Karamcharis Finance & Development Corporation (NSKFDC)
schemes.benefit: Concessional loans at 5% for Safai Karamcharis to start businesses or education
schemes.benefit_hi: सफाई कर्मचारियों को 5% ब्याज पर व्यापार/शिक्षा ऋण

schemes.name: National SC Finance & Development Corporation (NSFDC) Loans
schemes.benefit: Loan up to Rs 15 lakh at 2% (women) to 6% interest for SC income-generating activities
schemes.benefit_hi: SC वर्ग को 2% (महिला) से 6% ब्याज पर ₹15 लाख तक ऋण

schemes.name: Dr Ambedkar Foundation Scholarships & Awards
schemes.benefit: Merit-cum-means scholarship + Ambedkar Prerana Yatra for SC achievers
schemes.benefit_hi: SC उत्कृष्ट छात्रों को मेरिट आधारित छात्रवृत्ति + अंबेडकर प्रेरणा यात्रा

schemes.name: Stand Up India (SC/Women Entrepreneurs)
schemes.benefit: Bank loans Rs 10 lakh - Rs 1 crore for SC/Women greenfield enterprises
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/महिला उद्यमियों को ₹10 लाख - ₹1 करोड़ ऋण
schemes.eligibility: SC (and Women) starting first enterprise (18+ years)

schemes.name: Free Coaching for SC/OBC Students
schemes.benefit: Free coaching at empanelled institutes for UPSC/SSC/banking/JEE/NEET
schemes.eligibility: SC/OBC students; income < Rs 8 lakh/year; cleared screening

schemes.name: Special Central Assistance to Scheduled Castes Sub Plan
schemes.benefit: 100% central grant for economic development of BPL SC families across states
schemes.benefit_hi: राज्यों में BPL SC परिवारों के आर्थिक विकास के लिए 100% केंद्रीय अनुदान
schemes.eligibility: BPL SC families in states implementing SC Sub Plan

schemes.name: Hostels for SC Boys/Girls
schemes.benefit: Free hostel accommodation for SC students in educational hubs
schemes.benefit_hi: शैक्षिक हब में SC छात्रों को मुफ्त छात्रावास आवास
schemes.eligibility: SC students enrolled in recognized colleges/universities away from home

schemes.name: Atrocities Prevention & Rehabilitation (SCA to PCR/PoA)
schemes.benefit: Compensation Rs 1-8 lakh + rehabilitation support to SC/ST atrocity victims
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST अत्याचार पीड़ितों को ₹1-8 लाख मुआवजा + पुनर्वास
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST victims of violence/atrocities under PoA Act 1989
